name: Tim
goal: He wants to suggest a restaurant that serves authentic Italian dishes in a cozy atmosphere where everyone can relax and enjoy their meal without feeling rushed.
backstory: Tim has been a food blogger for a few years, sampling various cuisines and developing a keen sense of taste. He's particularly fond of Italian food, having spent a summer in Tuscany where he learned to cook traditional dishes. His friends often rely on him for restaurant recommendations.

focus_notes.cost: For Tim, cost is a consideration, but not the primary factor; he believes that a good dining experience can be found at various price points, and he's willing to splurge occasionally for a special meal.
focus_notes.comfort: Tim prioritizes comfort in terms of ambiance and service, looking for restaurants that offer a welcoming atmosphere where everyone can relax and enjoy their meal.
focus_notes.time: As someone who values exploration, Tim is open to trying new places, even if they're a bit farther away or require a reservation; he believes the experience is worth the extra time and effort.
focus_notes.safety: For Tim, safety refers to the quality of food handling and preparation; he looks for restaurants with good reputations and high hygiene standards to ensure a safe dining experience for everyone.
focus_notes.flexibility_focus: Tim appreciates flexibility in menus, preferring restaurants that can accommodate different dietary needs and preferences, ensuring that all members of the group can find something they enjoy.
